name: Passus Courseus
description: A legendary incantation that miraculously turns partial assignments into a passing grade.

name: Absencia Maxima
description: Temporarily hides your attendance record. Side effects may include sudden 'lab make-up' quests.

name: CtrlAltDelete Draft
description: One sip and you confidently delete broken code... and sometimes the correct folder too.

name: Expelliarmus
description: Disarms the opponent, forcing them to drop what they are holding.

name: Stupefy
description: Stuns the target and temporarily incapacitates them.

name: Lumos
description: Creates a small light at the tip of the wand.

name: Nox
description: Extinguishes light created by Lumos.

name: Protego
description: Conjures a protective shield to deflect minor spells and projectiles.

name: Alohomora
description: Unlocks doors and objects sealed by simple locks.

name: Wingardium Leviosa
description: Levitates an object and allows controlled movement in the air.

name: Petrificus Totalus
description: Temporarily immobilizes the target by locking their body.

name: Expecto Patronum
description: Summons a Patronus to repel Dementors and protect the caster.

name: Finite Incantatem
description: Terminates the effects of active spells in the immediate area.

name: Felix Felicis
description: Grants the drinker a period of extraordinary luck.

name: Polyjuice Potion
description: Allows the drinker to assume the appearance of another person.

name: Wiggenweld Potion
description: Restores vitality and heals minor injuries.

name: Pepperup Potion
description: Relieves common cold symptoms and warms the body.

name: Draught of Peace
description: Calms anxiety and reduces agitation, promoting peaceful sleep.

name: Veritaserum
description: A powerful truth serum that compels the drinker to speak honestly.

name: Amortentia
description: A potent love potion that causes strong infatuation in the drinker.

name: Invigoration Draught
description: Boosts energy and focus for a short duration.
